introduction.title: The Beginning of a Curiosity
introduction.text: From an early age, I developed a strong interest in technology. I began experimenting with simple electronic circuits, building small LED lamps, touch systems using transistors, and even a basic automated irrigation system. These early experiments sparked a constant curiosity to understand how technological systems work and how they could be improved or expanded.

software.title: Software Development
software.text: Over time, that curiosity naturally led me into the world of software development. I started by experimenting with C++, exploring programming logic and basic structures. Later, I focused on Android application development using Java and Kotlin, where I learned to work with fundamental technologies such as SQLite, Room, MVVM architecture, and ViewModels. I have also developed modern interfaces using XML with Material Design 3 and Material You, as well as integrated cloud services like Firebase for data synchronization and storage.

current.title: Currently
current.text: I am currently studying Computer Science while continuing to explore new technologies and development tools. In recent years, I have expanded my experience into web and cross-platform development using technologies such as React, React Native, Expo, TypeScript, JavaScript, HTML, and CSS—many of which are part of the development of this very website.

technologies.title: Technologies I Work With
technologies.android: Kotlin, Java, Android SDK, MVVM, ViewModels, SQLite, Room, Firebase, Material Design 3
technologies.embedded: ESP32, sensors, electronic prototyping, and embedded systems
technologies.web: React, React Native, Expo, TypeScript, JavaScript, HTML, and CSS

media.title: Media Appearance
media.description: Some of my technology projects have been publicly featured. In this television interview, I talk about the development of robotics projects and experimental systems that combine hardware and software.
media.video_title: Interview about robotics and technology projects

items.text: First experiments with electronics, building simple circuits and transistor-based systems.
Introduction to programming with C++ and exploration of logic and algorithms.
Development of Android applications using Java and Kotlin, learning MVVM architecture and local databases.
Participation in robotics projects and competitions, developing systems that integrate sensors, software, and autonomous control.
Exploring web and cross-platform development with React, React Native, and TypeScript while continuing to build technology projects.

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: If you are interested in my work or would like to collaborate on a project, feel free to reach out. I am always open to discussing technology, development, and new ideas.
